novel_features.name: Cross-resource grep
novel_features.description: Search across every chat message and meeting transcript at once with --since, --from-user, --in-meeting, --in-group filters.
novel_features.rationale: FTS5 indexes over locally-synced messages and transcripts; Roam HQ search is meeting-scoped.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this when an agent needs to recall what was said across many meetings without re-paging the rate-limited transcript API.

novel_features.name: Decision extractor
novel_features.description: Surface decision-shaped lines ("we decided", "action item", "agreed", "let's go with") from synced transcripts.
novel_features.rationale: Pure local regex over synced transcript text — no API call, no LLM.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when an agent owes the team a Monday recap; deterministic and citation-bearing.

novel_features.name: Attendance drift
novel_features.description: Compare invited guests vs actual attendance for an On-Air event; print invited-no-show and walk-in sets.
novel_features.rationale: Local SQL join of guests and attendance tables.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when an agent is asked who didn't show or who attended without an invite.

novel_features.name: Stale on-air reaper
novel_features.description: Find recurring On-Air events with zero attendance over N days. --apply cancels them via the absorbed cancel endpoint.
novel_features.rationale: Local aggregation over attendance history; --dry-run is the default.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when cleaning up dead recurring events; safe by default.

novel_features.name: Transcript prompt fan-out
novel_features.description: Run a single question against every transcript in a date range; one row per transcript with answer + citation.
novel_features.rationale: Roam's per-transcript prompt is single-shot; we loop it through the rate-limited client.
novel_features.example: roam-pp-cli transcript fanout --question "did anyone mention Q3 hiring?" --since 30d --agent
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when an agent must scan many meetings for a single question without re-prompting each one.

novel_features.name: Stdin chat relay
novel_features.description: Pipe arbitrary stdin lines into a Roam group via /chat.post with deterministic idempotency keys and 429 backoff.
novel_features.rationale: Wraps absorbed chat.post with stream-loop + dedupe key derived from line hash.
novel_features.example: tail -F deploys.log | roam-pp-cli relay --to eng-deploys --idempotent-key-prefix deploys
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when an agent needs to forward a stream (CI, alerts, logs) into Roam without writing a custom webhook.

novel_features.name: Webhook tail
novel_features.description: Tail recent webhook deliveries from the local subscription registry, --since filtered.
novel_features.rationale: Local table read populated by sync; one-shot, not a daemon.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when debugging a webhook integration without standing up a listener.

novel_features.name: Token tier doctor
novel_features.description: Probe one representative GET per spec family (HQ, On-Air, Chat, SCIM, Webhooks) and print which families this key can reach.
novel_features.rationale: Roam has two key tiers (full-access org, personal access token); reachability is asymmetric.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when an agent needs to know which Roam commands will work with the credential it has before attempting them.

novel_features.name: SCIM roster diff
novel_features.description: Diff a CSV/JSON HRIS roster against /Users SCIM list; print add/update/remove sets. --apply runs SCIM CRUD.
novel_features.rationale: CSV parse + SCIM list + set diff; uses absorbed SCIM endpoints.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when an agent needs to reconcile an external roster with Roam membership without clicking through admin UI.

novel_features.name: Mention inbox
novel_features.description: Local FTS over messages.text for @user tokens with --since filter; tail format.
novel_features.rationale: Mentions parsed at sync time into a mention index column.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when an agent must surface unread mentions across all groups without round-tripping the API per group.

narrative.headline: Every Roam HQ surface — chat, transcripts, On-Air events, SCIM, webhooks — in one local-first CLI with offline FTS search no other tool has.
narrative.value_prop: Roam HQ ships a remote MCP but no CLI. roam-pp-cli unifies all five Roam HQ APIs (HQ, On-Air, Chat, SCIM, Webhooks) into a single binary with a local SQLite cache and FTS5 search across messages and transcripts. Cron-friendly chat relay, decision extraction, attendance drift, and SCIM roster diff are built-in.
narrative.auth_narrative: Bearer auth via ROAM_API_KEY. Roam supports two key tiers: full-access organization keys and personal access tokens. Some HQ v1 endpoints require full-access; Chat/Transcript v0 endpoints work with PATs. Run `roam-pp-cli doctor token` to see which families your key can reach.

quickstart.comment: Verify which Roam APIs your key tier can reach before anything else.
Pull the last week of chat + transcripts into the local store for offline search.
Cross-resource FTS5 search over messages and transcripts.
Extract decision-shaped lines from synced transcripts.

quickstart.command: echo "Deploy v1.2.3 succeeded" | roam-pp-cli relay --to eng-deploys --idempotent-key-prefix deploys
quickstart.comment: Pipe CI output to a Roam group with dedupe + Retry-After backoff.

troubleshoots.symptom: 403 "This endpoint requires full access. Personal access tokens are not supported."
troubleshoots.fix: Run `roam-pp-cli doctor token` to see which spec families your token covers; use an organization-level key for HQ v1 endpoints.
The adaptive limiter honors Retry-After automatically. Reduce concurrent batches or use --idempotent-key-prefix for safe retries.
Run `roam-pp-cli sync --full transcripts messages` — incremental sync may not have populated yet.

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for roam-pp-cli when you need to script Roam HQ from a shell or agent: tail webhook deliveries, post deploy notifications, search transcripts across many meetings at once, reconcile SCIM membership against an HRIS roster, or extract decisions from last week's recordings. The remote MCP at api.ro.am/mcp is great for ad-hoc agent chat; this CLI is the choice when you want pipelines, cron, or local-first search.

recipes.title: Daily standup digest
recipes.explanation: Pull yesterday's decisions from the standup group, formatted for agent consumption with citation.

recipes.title: Cross-meeting question scan
recipes.command: roam-pp-cli transcript fanout --question "did anyone mention Q3 hiring?" --since 30d --agent
recipes.explanation: Run one question against every transcript in the last 30 days.

recipes.title: Reconcile HRIS roster with Roam SCIM
recipes.explanation: See add/update/remove sets before applying; drop --dry-run to execute.

recipes.title: Pipe CI alerts into Roam
recipes.explanation: Stream CI log lines into a Roam group with deterministic dedupe.

recipes.title: Narrow a deeply-nested transcript response
recipes.explanation: Use --select with dotted paths to keep agent context small on long transcripts.

trigger_phrases: what did we decide in roam
